data.title: Elkem reported EBITDA of NOK 890m in Q4 2025, down from NOK 1,173m last year. Sales agreement entered for Silicones division.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on February 13, 2026, Elkem announced an EBITDA of NOK 890 million for the fourth quarter of 2025. This figure represented a decrease from NOK 1,173 million in the same period the previous year. Despite facing difficult market conditions, Elkem managed to alleviate the impact through enhanced cost efficiencies and taking advantage of a robust market.

data.title: Huhtamäki Oyj's 2025 results: Net sales down 4%, EUR 3,960.2 million; EUR 171.9 million capex; Dividend proposed: EUR 1.14 per share.
data.description: Huhtamäki Oyj released its financial statement for the period January 1 to December 31, 2025. In Q4 2025, net sales decreased by 7% to EUR 980.5 million, with reported EBIT at EUR 89.0 million. For the full year, net sales decreased by 4% to EUR 3,960.2 million, with reported EBIT at EUR 320.5 million. Adjusted EBIT for the full year was EUR 405.1 million, with EPS at EUR 1.83. The company's capital expenditure was EUR 171.9 million, and free cash flow was EUR 311.2 million. The Board of Directors has proposed a dividend of EUR 1.14 per share. The company's president and CEO highlighted successful implementation of new value drivers and operating models in response to market challenges, resulting in improved financial performance and steady EPS. Despite challenges due to cautious consumer spending and geopolitical tensions, the company saw growth opportunities in certain segments, such as North America and Fiber Packaging. Overall, the company maintained a strong financial position, with a focus on disciplined capital allocation and value creation for shareholders.

Chardan Capital Markets reduces its target price on Alnylam Pharmaceuticals from $475 to $425.

data.title: WuKong Chinese tops global ranking with most paying users, as per Frost & Sullivan. #1 in Chinese education online for non-native regions.
data.description: In Mountain View, California on February 13, 2026, WuKong Education revealed that its top brand, WuKong Chinese, has achieved the remarkable position of being ranked as the number one online Chinese education platform worldwide catering to non-native Chinese-speaking areas. This accomplishment is based on the impressive number of cumulative paying users utilizing the platform.

data.title: China Daily launches Dunhuang sub-platform under "China Bound" for international travelers, making it easier to explore the popular destination in China.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, China Daily announced the launch of the Dunhuang sub-platform within its "China Bound" initiative. This English-language smart-tourism service platform aims to showcase the cultural and historical significance of Dunhuang. The platform seeks to attract both domestic and international visitors to the region. This initiative comes as part of China Daily's efforts to promote tourism and cultural exchange.

data.title: Uptiq secures $25M Series B funding from various investors to expand AI solutions for financial services.
data.description: In Dallas, Uptiq, a specialized AI platform for financial services, has secured $25 million in Series B funding. The investment comes from a consortium of key investors in the banking, fintech, and enterprise software sectors. Curql spearheaded the funding round, joined by notable participants such as Silverton Partners, 645 Ventures, Broadridge, Green Visor Capital, Live Oak Ventures, First Capital, Epic Ventures, Tau Ventures, and Evolution VC. The platform aims to enhance AI capabilities for banks and credit unions.

data.title: Trump family to launch FX and remittance platform to tap into global market with $9.6 trillion daily trading volume.
data.description: The platform targets a portion of the immense daily trading volume of over $9.6 trillion in the foreign currency exchange market.

data.title: Reju selects Lacq for its Regeneration Hub, converting post-consumer textiles into recycled polyester. Paris, Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Reju, a France-based textile-to-textile regeneration company, revealed plans to establish an industrial-sized Regeneration Hub in Lacq. The facility aims to convert post-consumer textiles into premium recycled polyester. This initiative signifies a significant step towards sustainability and circular economy practices.

data.title: Echoworx email encryption now on AWS Marketplace, simplifying security for global businesses. Mission to make secure communication accessible.
data.description: In Toronto, Echoworx, a renowned email encryption provider, has launched on AWS Marketplace, completely utilizing AWS infrastructure. This move allows global enterprises to enhance the security of their sensitive communications with greater convenience right from the point of purchase. The decision to join AWS Marketplace aligns with Echoworx’s core objective of simplifying secure communications for all. This strategic step emphasizes the commitment to making secure communication more effortless and widely available.

data.title: HanchorBio's HCB101 granted FDA orphan drug designation for gastric cancer, first of its kind. TPEx: 7827.
data.description: A groundbreaking development in the field of cancer treatment has been made as the first SIRPα-IgG4 Fc fusion protein has been granted orphan status for gastric cancer. HanchorBio, Inc., a leading global clinical-stage biotechnology company, announced this significant milestone on Feb. 13, 2026. The protein, developed to advance next-generation immunotherapies for oncology and autoimmune diseases, has the potential to revolutionize treatment options. This news comes as HanchorBio's stock (TPEx: 7827) continues to gather attention and support in the medical community worldwide.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins NFT brand opens Valentine's Day pop-up shop in NYC with pink-themed decor and attractions.
data.description: The famous non-fungible token collection Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) revealed the launch of a Valentine's Day pop-up shop in New York City. The pop-up shop is located at 55 Delancey Street and features a pink-themed setup. A video shared on Pudgy Penguins' X account showcased the vibrant space with a costumed "Pengu" welcoming visitors. The shop is adorned with heart-shaped displays, soft toys, plush bouquets, couple's photo booths, real-life photo opportunities, and a variety of drinks and treats. The pop-up shop will be open from Thursday to Saturday, operating daily from 12 p.m. to 6 p.m.

data.title: Crypto usage in human trafficking networks increased in 2025. Chainalysis noted a surge despite blockchain's transparency aiding law enforcement.
data.description: According to Chainalysis, the utilization of cryptocurrency in trafficking networks is increasing. Despite this trend, the transparency of blockchain technology could provide insight into these activities, potentially assisting law enforcement agencies.
